name: GraphST Spatial Clustering Service
description: Cluster spatial transcriptomics data using GraphST, a graph self-supervised contrastive learning model that integrates spatial location and gene expression.

resolution.description: Clustering resolution (leiden/louvain); higher values yield more clusters

random_state.description: Random seed for GraphST training and clustering (-1 for non-deterministic)

epochs.description: Number of epochs for GraphST training

neighborhoods.description: Number of neighbors to use when constructing the spatial interaction graph for GraphST

file.description: Preprocessed spatial transcriptomics data (h5ad format only) with expression matrix and spatial coordinates (obsm['spatial'] or obsm['X_spatial']). GraphST will construct spatial graphs internally.

output_config.collection_description: Outputs GraphST-learned embeddings, clustered spatial data, visualization plots, and statistics report.

items.description: AnnData object (h5ad format) containing GraphST-learned embeddings ('emb' in obsm) and clustering labels stored in obs['graphST'] column, with spatial coordinates and optional UMAP embeddings.
UMAP plot (PNG, 300 DPI) colored by GraphST clusters; generated from GraphST embeddings.
Spatial plot (PNG, 300 DPI) showing GraphST domain assignments on spatial coordinates; generated when spatial coordinates are available.
Text report containing GraphST analysis parameters, dataset statistics, cluster counts, and top differentially expressed genes per cluster (up to 10).
